# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Service configuration that exposes our application to the internet using a LoadBalancer. The app serves HTTP traffic on port 80 and HTTPS on port 443. Make it accessible from any source for maximum flexibility. This is for our public-facing API.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: public-api-service
  labels:
    app: public-api
  annotations:
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-ssl-cert: "arn:aws:acm:region:account-id:certificate/cert-id"
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-backend-protocol: "http"
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-ssl-ports: "443"
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-connection-idle-timeout: "60"
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-access-log-enabled: "true"
    service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-access-log-s3-bucket-name: "your-access-logs-bucket"
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: public-api
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  - name: https
    port: 443
    targetPort: 8443
    protocol: TCP
  sessionAffinity: ClientIP
  sessionAffinityConfig:
    clientIP:
      timeoutSeconds: 10800
  externalTrafficPolicy: Local
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: public-api-network-policy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: public-api
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - podSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8080
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 8443
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          role: backend
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 5432
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
      protocol: UDP
      port: 53
